tool.name: jwt_toolkit
tool.description: JWT Security Toolkit for JWT attacks and manipulation.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Decode and analyze JWT tokens - Perform 'none' algorithm attack - Test RS256 to HS256 algorithm confusion - Brute force HMAC secret - Forge tokens with custom claims - JWK injection attacks

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The JWT attack to perform: - decode: Decode and analyze JWT - none_attack: Create JWT with 'none' algorithm - alg_confusion: Test RS256->HS256 confusion - crack_secret: Brute force HMAC secret - forge_token: Create forged token with custom claims - jwk_injection: Create token with injected JWK

parameter.name: token
parameter.description: JWT token to manipulate. Required for decode, none_attack, alg_confusion, crack_secret, jwk_injection.

parameter.name: claims
parameter.description: Custom claims for forged token. Required for forge_token.

parameter.name: algorithm
parameter.description: Algorithm to use for token creation

returns.description: Results of JWT attack including manipulated tokens

tool.examples:
# Decode JWT
decode eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0.dozjgNryP4J3jVmNHl0w5N_XgL0n3I9PlFUP0THsR8U
# None algorithm attack
none_attack eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...
# Crack secret
crack_secret eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs... ["secret", "password", "key123"]
# Forge token
forge_token {"sub": "admin", "role": "admin"} my_secret
